sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings(id Int32, text String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Hello World'), (2, 'ClickHouse Database');
SELECT id, locate('o', text) AS position FROM test_strings;
UPDATE test_strings SET text = 'Hello ClickHouse' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, locate('Click', text, 1) AS start_position FROM test_strings WHERE locate('House', text) > 0;
